entry.title: Re: How to Create Deeplinks by using Specific Tab URL in...
entry.content:
Hi  AliAkbalik , 

   If your 'tab' refers to 'page' in SAC story, you can add page parameter into the URL: 

  1. Get the URL of story: go to story -> share -> copy the default link from there. 
  2. Add '?page=x' (x = page number) to the end of the link. 

   You can get more information from this help page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/a4406994704e4af5a8559a640b496468/fe8d560fce4f4fdd8445455f8effd3c0.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Creating namespace using 'AIF/CUST' Tcode giving 'Thi...
entry.content: One would assume that AIF is simply not present on your system. If you're not on S/4, you have to install it explicitly (see this page here: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/application-interface-framework).

entry.title: SAP Business One Customer Overpayment Allocation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One Experts,

I have a situation where I am getting some excess payments from our customers. I need to transfer it to a Specific GL account in the same receipt (Incoming payment)

Eg: Outstanding Invoice is 100 USD, Customer pays 102 USD. I need to transfer excess payment of 2 USD to a GL account in the same incoming payment and  GL entries should be generated as follows

Bank Dr 103, Customer Cr 100 and assigned GL account Cr 3

 

Thanks in Advance

Sam

entry.title: Re: Guide to configurate and customize SAP CPM
entry.content:
You can refer CPM administrators guide on below link.

chrome-extension://efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj/https://help.sap.com/doc/9c96da5fbedc460fbb3aa5946bdc1be6/2.0.07/en-US/Admin_Guide_CPD_2_0_SP07.pdf

You can also refer below link for CPM contents:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCIAL_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_S4H

entry.title: Re: Delete duplicate customers in SAP CDC
entry.content:
Hello @carlos_riva,

In this case of duplicate data, only one user will have the email address as a login identifier, while for the remaining duplicate email users, it'll be listed under email addresses since the CDC System Design does not permit duplicates.

To clean up all those contacts without loginIDs, you can use a Dataflow with the following steps:

  1. Identify users with blank login identifiers.
  2.  For the list obtained in step-1, check if any users have the email address as their login identifier.

I hope this answers your query to close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: LTMC material uploading error
entry.content: Hi please check if it's internal number range or external number range when loading the Material master data. It's probably because internal number range, a new material number was generated.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems

entry.title: Re: Converting Amount into Words using JavaScript in Adobe
entry.content:
Thank you Vrushali, for this detailed and insightful post. The JavaScript program you provided for converting amounts into words according to the Indian currency format was exactly what I needed. It worked perfectly in my Adobe forms and resolved the limitations I was facing with FormCalc. Your explanation and examples were very clear and helpful.

Thanks again for sharing this solution!

Best regards,
Nithesh

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM
entry.content: Thanks very much. Once we reinstall the Office 365 that problem is resolved.

entry.title: Re: BOM Explosion in Delivery without Reference to Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Emanuele,

According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration.

However, you can start your process from Sales Order, not from outbound delivery directly.

It would be also helpful for the discussion if you can share why you can’t start from Sales Order in your process.

Best Regards,

Sean

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content: Hello, and thank you for your answer. I do not receive the staging method on the DM side. Im guessing its an connection problem (e.g. data inconsistency) in the BTP/CPI. The configurations in the SOAMANAGER seem to work, at least thats what the Ping Web Service tells me.

entry.title: Re: BOM Explosion in Delivery without Reference to Sales...
entry.content: Hi Emanuele, According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration. However, you can start your process from Sales Order, not from outbound delivery directly. It would be also helpful for the discussion if you can share why you can’t start from Sales Order in your process. Best Regards, Sean

entry.title: Re: ATC Check error - The SELECT command is executed on the database (SELECT 694)
entry.content: SELECT ##ITAB_DB_SELECT DI_CODE, COUNT( MATNR ) AS MATNR_COUNT FROM @LT_LIPS_MARA AS LIPS_MARA GROUP BY DI_CODE INTO TABLE @DATA(LT_SUMMARY).

entry.title: Re: TAN as higher level item category for Sales Order Typ...
entry.content: Hi Sam, According to my expert, it's not possible to achieve what you're asking in S/4HANA Cloud, and there is also no plan to support it in standard, and it couldn't be done via customer configuration. However, you can think about to try the sales kit functionality which is covered with scope item 31Q. Best Regards, Sean

entry.title: Re: Report layout not showing in BPC Add ins using with EPM

Please ask your local IT team install office 365. I think it will resolve the problem. Also check below setting.

Thanks and Regards,

Venkat.

entry.title: UI5 Tooling 4.0
entry.content:
UI5 Tooling 4.0

The UI5 Core team is pleased to announce the release of UI5 Tooling 4.0.

This release has a strong focus on enabling UI5 2.x compatibility for projects. In addition, we introduced a new feature for automatically generating locale information in the manifest.json. Along with some important housekeeping.

We are doing our best to minimize upgrade efforts for UI5 developers. Projects currently working with UI5 Tooling 3.x are generally expected to work with UI5 Tooling 4.0. More on this below.

Node.js and npm Requirements

UI5 Tooling 4.0 requires Node.js v20.11.0, v22.0.0, or higher.

This allows us to make use of the latest Node.js features and to upgrade dependencies requiring current Node.js versions.

Specification Version 4.0

This new major Specification Version comes with breaking changes that might have an impact on projects. Please carefully read the migration guide before applying the new version to your projects.

These changes are mostly related to how bundles are created in UI5 Tooling. Even if you do not use custom bundles, this might have an impact on the initial loading behavior of your application or library. These changes pave the road for future improvements on bundling in UI5. Stay tuned for more!

UI5 2.x

UI5 Tooling 4.0 along with the new Specification Version 4.0 is required for projects to utilize UI5 2.x.

When defining Specification Version 4.0 in your project, the code generated by UI5 Tooling will apply all the current best practices, such as consistently loading resources asynchronously and terminating the use of "eval()" (a common CSP violation). Both of which are prerequisites for projects to be compatible with UI5 2.x.

New Feature: Automatic Generation of Locale Information

In your application or library project, UI5 Tooling will now analyze existing manifest.json files. For any "i18n" and "ResourceModel" configurations, it will ensure that the "supportedLocales" property is defined. If it is not defined, it will be filled automatically based on the translation files present in the project.

This will improve user experience by avoiding unnecessary requests at runtime. Without a defined set of "supported locales", UI5 runtime has to determine the available translations by requesting individual files, often resulting in "404 Not Found" server responses.

Note that you can opt out of this behavior by defining the "supportedLocales" property yourself. The feature is active for both, the build and the server.

Learn more about this new feature in the builder documentation.

Upgrade Today

Upgrading to UI5 Tooling 4.0 is a straightforward task for most projects.

First, ensure you meet the minimum required versions of Node.js and npm using the commands "node --version" and "npm --version". Make sure to also check your CI/CD workflows.

Then upgrade the UI5 CLI in your project by executing the following command:

npm i --save-dev @ui5/cli@latest

Also update your global install using:

npm i --global @ui5/cli@latest

You may already stop there, since updating the Specification Version remains optional.

However, if you want UI5 Tooling to apply the current best practices when building your project, also update the "specVersion" property in all ui5.yaml files to "4.0": 

 

specVersion: "4.0"
[...]

 

Afterwards, test your project as usual. In case any problems come up, make sure to check our migration guide. And if you need further assistance, we invite you to raise an issue on GitHub.

entry.title: Re: Error when I upgrade HANA database from ver: 2402 to...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP

1. Please check and  make sure, the database user that used for upgrade process has privilege assigned according to the guide : https://help.sap.com/doc/4e7c047f2c9e4cbe97800ffaf7b68f8e/10.0/en-US/B1_for_SAP_HANA_Admin_Guide.pdf

Please make sure the database user has BACKUP ADMIN and BACKUP OPERATOR privilege and then try again.

Granting Roles and Privileges to Database Users follow steps as below:
- In the SAP HANA studio, connect to your system as a superuser (for example, SYSTEM).
- In the Administration Console, under the Security folder of your system, under Users, double-click the database user, then details of the database user get displayed on the right.
- In the right panel, add required roles or privileges.
- To apply the changes, click (Deploy) or press F 8

2. Please backup and remove SBO-COMMON database, attempt to upgrade again.
Also, you can install or upgrade only the SLD components and company database as first step(but not repository), and then, perform the steps detailed in the SAP NOTE 1455344 - How to Recreate the SBO-COMMON Database in SAP Business One to re-create the repository.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Renumber G/L Accounts, mapping value is in Released m...

entry.title: Customization IMG tree wiped out after 2023 FPS01 Upgrade
entry.content:
Hello all,

each time we have carried out a 2023 FPS01 upgrade, the customization tree gets wiped out, totally deleted, does anyone know why and how it can be prevented ?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Dear @gianluca_taccone,

thanks for the document.

I have a question: in our case we load only the next year budget (as it's approved yearly), but for some OPEX, like maintenance, we have multi-year contracts.

So, let's say, in oct-2024 we got 2025's budget and in dec-2024 we signed a contract covering 2025-2027 (essentially, assuming we'll get enough budget the following years).

My client wants the budget to be checked only for 2025 (at least, till 2026 budget is approved and loaded).

I see different issues in this approach (mainly on purchase requests/purchase order level: how can the system know which period each line refers to? and if the same line covers different years?).

I was wondering if you ever had such a situation (timing in your 4th scenario is considered, but it assumes we have a multiyear budget, which we don't).

Your hints would be much appreciated.


Best

Marco

entry.title: Fiori App F2359 Error: Target was not found
entry.content:
When opening Fiori App F2359 an error come up:

Target was not found 

sap.ui.generic.app.navigation.service.NavigationHandler is not a constructor

 

OData-services + SICF services were checked....also in F12 DEV mode of MS Edge.

Do you have an idea?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Henning

entry.title: Re: Change SE16 Layout
entry.content: The former on is SE16, the latter SE16N

entry.title: Workflow Substitute - Is it possible to create a substitute for a single Workflow Task?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently when creating a Substitute via SBWP, the other user sees all tasks/items assigned to the original user the items are assigned to.

Is it possible to create a substitute, not for all tasks/items, but for one specific task only? if so, how can this be achieved?

Thanks for your help.

Would you please kindly help further?

entry.title: Can a dismantling product order generate only raw materials and not consume finished products?
entry.content:
Hi, experts

Our company has some defective products, and we can dismantle these defective products and use some of the raw materials. I can manage them by creating disassembly product orders. Is it possible that the components of my dismantling product order can have only raw material output and no consumption of finished goods, as this part of the finished goods has already been scrapped. Will there be any impact on the financial side in particular?

entry.title: All transactions linked to a material in one app
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any application in public cloud which can give a list of all transactions (production orders, deliveries, Sales orders, order reservations etc) linked to a material? Something similar to customer 360 app but for a product?

We currently use MD04 but that's not easy to read and scroll through. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Is there an API Endpoint to attach a file to a specific quote?
entry.content: Hello, did you managed to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Display of page map fails
entry.content: Hi Miguel, Thanks a lot for your comment. My application is indeed based on a OData V4 service. But all fiori tool packages are up-to-date (cf. screen copy in my original post). Also, there are are SAP e-Learnings out there where the page map works perfectly fine for fiori element apps based on ODate V4 services. The point is that the page map is supposed to facilitate the development and the maintenance of the fe front-end. So I really believe that the probleme I describe is due to a but. Best regards, Axel.

entry.title: Is there a way to schedule FBW4 / F-20 in background ?
entry.content:
Dear All

I am looking for a solution to reverse bill liability in background. I don't see how to do that with F-20 or FBW4.

Any idea?

Thanks for your help

BR

Julien

entry.title: How to configure different product cost estimation for different BOM version
entry.content:
Hi experts

could you please give me some suggestions on this scnario

for a bom item, I have already a BOM version which is used in production. the BOM usage is 1-production. now I want to create another BOM which is only used for cost estimation/forcast (not updating the current standard cost price) . 

how to setup in SAP to achive such requiremnt? thanks!

entry.title: Re: Display of page map fails

The only different thing was the OData Service, so i thought that that must be the problem. Greetings, Miguel 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum

I would like to somehow aggregate them in order for them to appear instead of adding more filters which would solve the problem but defeat the purpose of my story.

thank you for sharing your experience. Yes, I guess there is no way around using custom code. We will be using EA for reporting. I think presenting the per customer results will work there, but it is in another app/window so that will make it harder for sales administrators to understand the calculation flow and how the numbers lead to the calculated results.

Kind regards,

Max

entry.title: Re: Change SE16 Layout

entry.title: Re: How to Create Deeplinks by using Specific Tab URL in...
entry.content: Hi William Yu thanks a lot for your answer, it works.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Mechanisms for putting production order on ho...
entry.content:
Hello,


I believe this task can be addressed using the Production Process Designer and triggers.

For example, after a specific event occurs, you can initiate an order check and update the status if something is missing. By using a stock change trigger, you can check the order for which the movement was made and update the status accordingly. Another option is to run checks periodically to verify availability.

Best regards,
Ruslan

entry.title: Re: sap mobile start - how to create a tile to launch custom app developed using mdk in sap bas?
entry.content:
Hi @gaurav_setu ,  if you're MDK apps are deployed natively you can follow the blog by selecting No-System in the content manager. Only with this selection you will get the option to create the "Native Tiles" for iOS / Android leveraging the URL Scheme of your native app. 

Otherwise if you're calling webapps you can create "usual" tiles with a system and another UI technology. Those would also show on the Work Zone launchpad and will be available in SAP Mobile Start as well. 

Hope this helps! Best regards, 
Dennis

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content: LOEKZ does not change from what value to what value? (i.e. what value do you have before, what value do you expect after? What happens if you try to change it manually via ME22N? Did you check the many SAP notes about BAPI_PO_CHANGE and LOEKZ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Thank you for this initiative.

I hold a BSc in Science (Mathematics). Currently I am a mid-career switcher and have been unemployed for more than a year.

I have been trying to apply to various tech jobs to no success. I am keen to learn more digital skills, in particular relating to the SAP ecosystem and I think this opportunity will be a great platform for me to start with.

Hope to hear from you soon.

Regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Overview of SuccessFactors extensions on SAP Cloud Platform
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question and need some clarification. My company recently subscribed to the SuccessFactors Cloud, and it's not clear whether SAP will provide it as a two or three-system landscape deployment. After discussing it with the account manager and sales technical SF, they mentioned it would be only a two-system landscape. However, I have read in many blogs that the SF Cloud has three system landscapes.

Could you please provide some insight into this issue?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: If you need my CDS code and annotations i'll be happy to provide what I can to solve this..

entry.title: Re: DMO with system move with shd rep on target DB
entry.content:
Hi Boris
Reg. SPDD and SPAU will be performed on Target server, hence co-file datafile and umodauto.lst will be generating /usr/sap/trans in target (we have different trans dir. in Azure and on-premises). 
 In Next system DMO, Sum will search SPDD and SPAU TR in source system /usr/sap/trans (source SUm configuration phase)
so do we need to copy PSDD and SPAU co-files, datafiles and umodauto.lst from target to source trans dir?

TR
K

entry.title: Is there a version of the Crystal Report Runtime which works on Tomcat 10.1 and Java 21?
entry.content:
I am in the process of upgrading our core application to run on updated libraries - specifically the latest LTS Java version (OpenJDK 21) along with Tomcat 10.1 - which includes the Jakarta library migration.

Part of our application contains an integration with SAP Crystal Reports for our reporting - and we host the SAP Crystal Reports viewer as part of this on the same Tomcat instance.

We are currently using the 2020 version, but after having a look at the options available, it seems all the ones I checked are reliant on javax classes (which are not available in the newer versions of Java given the Jakarta migration changes).

I have tried several versions of the Crystal Report Viewer - such as the 2020 build, and the latest runtime included in Crystal Report For Eclipse - both have the same errors about javax classes not being present - indicating that the Crystal Report Runtime seems to be still relying on javax.servlet - which is not part of Tomcat 10.1.

Downloads were from here: https://origin.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/site/index.html

Are there any versions of the Crystal Reports Runtime which work on the latest builds of Tomcat and Java, given it's EOL coming in the next few years?

Happy to switch runtimes if there is one released, it is quite possible I missed one if it exists as I am new here - but any advice would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Pascal

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content: Still thinking about those additional questions.

entry.title: Data Source and Service Selection configuration in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hello,

I am doing the exercise Creating an analytical list page of the course "Developing and Extending SAP Fiori Elements Apps". I don't know how to complete the Data Source and Service Selection in SAP Business Application Studio.

I've completed the previous exercises. According to the information provided in the Git repository, I am supposed to get "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial" as an option for "System":

 

Based on the information provided in the Git repository, I assume this option means connecting to the back end I've used earlier in this course. In Eclipse, I needed to provide a service key and to log in to connect the back end, in VSCode, I needed only to provide a service key, and in SAP BAS, I don't see a possibility to provide a service key.

Why do I not get the option "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial" for "System"?

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: Re: Authority Check-For Cost Center Based on User name
entry.content:
So much wrong here, I barely know where to start.

But a few things that will prevent your code from doing what it probably should:

  • you read your custom table with user and cost center number - but the variable lv_cs is not filled anywhere
  • you do an authority check on an authorization object named z_cs_auth - does that actually exist? If it does, you will need to pass it to the function authority_check in upper case. (Or, better: just directly use the ABAP statement AUTHORITY-CHECK, rather than going through the function.)

And please, when you post code, do post it formatted as code. Like this it's really hard to read.

entry.title: Re: Sending HU information to S/4 Delivery after Packing from SAP EWM- A workaround Solution
entry.content:
@manuel_g We have a similar requirement, wanted to check on your latest comment if you were able to perform the PPF to trigger HU's using the new status, 'Ready for Shipping'?

I have release S/42023 FPS00, so I probably should have this functionality available in the system.

Thank You.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: Unfortunately I cannot see any headline, nor the currency ... but my assumption is that some values are not displayed due to different currencies, which cannot be aggregated. If you drill-down the currency, how does the result look then?

entry.title: Sales Order Simulate API
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently we are using Sales order simulate (A2X API) for performing the availability check. This API returns the final confirmed delivery date of the schedule line. I'm looking for the underlying dates in the schedule line, ex: Material availability data, Loading date, Transit time. Is there any way to achieve this during the Simulate Process. I couldnt find any documentation related to this. 

Thanks,

Bharath

entry.title: Re: Use Action Buttons in Operation Activity List plugin in PODs
entry.content:
Manoel I was curious if there is a way to share your amazing PODs in order to use them in our tenant.

Event better if SAP provide a "POD Marketplace'

entry.title: Re: Empty Adobe form when called from an application program
entry.content:
Hello,

You can use the debugger to extract the XFD.xml file. This is the input data that is sent to the ADS to generate the output. If this is already empty, you should further check your application site. If this is correct, the form could be the issue.

For more information:
KBA 2359874 - How to collect PDF data during generation runtime? [VIDEO]
https://me.sap.com/notes/2359874

entry.content: That's allowed! 🙂 Have fun.

Rakesh

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: BTW are you still stuck? Let us know, and if so, also provide a bit more info on what you were doing when you got the "Expected ..." error. Good luck!

entry.title: Re: Configuring Certificate Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog, it gave me a good start. We have CLM for ABAP working now on our environment signing with a Remote CA.

We had a couple of issues with permissions on the certificate templates on Microsoft side but all got resolved.

We have the report SSF_CERT_RENEW running once a month with 20 days variant.

On to the Java systems config now. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content:
Ok, if you don't have currencies, then it is probably still a matter of annotations on the key figures... see this example: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/bwplaolap/3361382991.html

here you can see:

@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
seatsocc as NumberOfOccupiedSeats

Do you have the same above your key figure (I cannot see the Name)?

@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
<YOUR KEY FIGURE>

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: BTW, talking of Math.max, I wrote a short blog post on different ways to achieve what's required here in the implementation. You (and others, perhaps) may find it interesting: Highest value in JS - different ways.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Analytic Model Series – Calculated and Restricted Measures
entry.content:
Hi, 

thank you for the blog. 

Is there any way to calculate the percentage between two measures?

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: I cleaned my code and I changed my setup for CQL and it started working 🎉

entry.title: Re: iOS Building Error
entry.content: Hi, Anyone facing same issue as mine? need urgent help on this. and what workaround did you do at least temporary solution? thanks

entry.title: Re: New Learning Journey for SAP Master Data Governance for Beginners
entry.content:
@habeebrehan

Central governance is planned to come with SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition, master data governance (according to SAP Roadmap Explorer). Also, more domains are planned for SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition (according to SAP Roadmap Explorer).

entry.title: Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently unable to access the provided exercises for "Practicing Clean Core Extensibility for SAP S4/HANA Cloud".

Each time I try to open the exercises, I encounter an internal error. (Internal error message is attached below).

For example, the following exercises (among others) could not be loaded:

  • Collect Usage Data using the ABAP Call Monitor
  • Create a UX using SAP Build Apps
  • Specify a Migration Scope using the Custom Code Migration App
  • Explore ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Objects
  • Utilize the SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • ......

I would appreciate it if you could investigate the issue. Please let me know if there are any updates or if there is an estimated time for resolving this problem.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Hi there - can you supply more info. When does the sqlite error occur, what are you requesting? It's hard to guess what the problem might be without this sort of info. Is the service (in CF) available publicly, and if so, what is the URL (so we can check)? Cheers!

entry.title: Re: S/4 Public Cloud CBC:Event-Based Revenue Recognition...
entry.content:
Hi, 

just a quick update regarding your question: With the SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 release, an automatic imminent loss handling process is available for EPPM projects. To learn more, see Loss Handling with Event-Based Revenue Recognition.

I hope that helps! 

Kind regards, 

Janina

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Hello DJ @qmacro ,

Here is my observation.

1. Calling the entity with  Key-as-Segmen is possible in CAP, as it is supporting oData v4 out-of the box.

2 To read just the scalar values, we can use the $value get the data.

odata/v4/northbreeze/Products/11/Category/CategoryName/$value

entry.title: Re: Regarding material & Service line item in Purchase Or...
entry.content:
Hi, 

You can use the standard tables EKKO and EKPO.

entry.title: Re: Sloc to sloc against the bin to bin transfer
entry.content:
hi,

LE-WM

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Hi 

 

I have created the program, but the custom tasks are not getting saved on it it's allowing the standard tasks only

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: Excellent, well done!

entry.title: Re: J2EE Instance does not start while while installing N...
entry.content: Now, after a few Days i finally found a Solution by myself. It was just to use another Java Components Package, even if i already tried a few of them. For the Netweaver 7.5 you have to use the 'SAP Netweaver 7.5 SP22 Java' Package and not the 'NW 7.5 Java based SW Comp.s 1/2 + 2/2'. Sadly there was given a wrong directory in the installation, so you couldnt see this right away.

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content: That's very odd - can you share your code / project?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Sum
entry.content: This is what I have on my consumption view

entry.title: Purchase Order, creation of conditions record
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

as part of my project (on S/4HANA) I need to create record conditions (MEK1) but I find that this subject is not very clear, particularly the technical resolution.

I cannot use the BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS FM because it has a not Released status, then I wanted to use the RV_CONDITION_COPY/RV_CONDITION_MAINTENANCE... FMs but once again these FMs are not released.

Then I came across the CL_PURGPRCG_CNDNRECORD_API class which seems to correspond to my needs but there is very little information on this class, there is just a blog (thanks to the author) but not very precise in my opinion, moreover why there is no class level documentation?

Finally there is the OData service API_PURGPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV which also seems to correspond but I wonder about the relevance of using this service for performance reasons (wrongly?), moreover it is not even activated in my system .

In short, I am lost in the technical path to take, thanks in advance to all those who are willing to guide me through this labyrinth 🙂

entry.title: Inventory Reconciliation S/4HANA Cloud and 3 Party Warehouse Management
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where we need the inventory to be updated in S4HC based on the stock status in 3rd party warehouse. My S4HC is integrated with 3PL warehouse provider. The source system is the 3rd Party WM system.

Is there a standard way of doing this via batch job.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content:
Excellent! Thanks for providing your thoughts. 

It's worth mentioning here that it's possible to use key-as-segment addressing CAP, not because CAP supports OData V4 out of the box, just that CAP supports this optional alternate convention. The Northwind service at https://services.odata.org/V4/Northwind/Northwind.svc/ doesn't support that, but it's still an OData V4 service.

Also, I can't resist pointing out that it's "OData", not "oData" 🙂

entry.title: Error posting new HU in empty bin for PI process EWM
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I got a problem in the physical inventory process when i try to post in EWM after count process.

The error occurs for an HU that doesn't exist in the storage bin (and in SAP), but when i try to do it i got the next error:

"Error reading stock data for HU 6045BD8D37561EDDA89863E31550DB4E"

Sap error msg: /SCWM/GM755

The Header data for that HU is the next one:

And the item data is the following one:

I'm missing something to fulfill or there is problem in the system, how can i solve this?

 

Thanks,

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Dividends Elimination - Group Reporting - Public Cloud
entry.content: Hello Thank you for your response. Yes, I have checked this point but if I am not mistaken in the case of the purchase method there is no step to remove it as I see it is empty. Regards

entry.title: Remove indentation in Hierarchy SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

 Is it possible in SAC to remove indentation in hierarchies?

Thanks

entry.title: Show rows with empty dimensions values required to fix reports from BO 4.2 to BO 4.3
entry.content:
Hi

This is my first post on the SAP Community, so hopefully I have joined the correct group.

I have migrated everything from the Business Objects 4.2 to a new server with BO 4.3 using the Promotion Management Wizard. Some of the reports are showing blanks in some of the rows on one report tab and on another report tab the opposite rows have blanks.

Enabling "Show rows with empty dimensions values" on the report on BO 4.3 fixes the problem, is there a way to enable this option to all effected reports without needing to open every report and every tab to make the change?

The reports display correctly in BO 4.2 with this option disabled.

Thanks

Kenny

entry.title: Re: Lease-in accounting - migration
entry.content: Hi, we are also highly interested to get more information and guidance on migration *Lease In Accounting* for SAP Public Cloud? Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Devender Kumar Yadav from India who holds a Chartered Financial Analyst Degree from ICFAI and a bachelor of commerce in Accounting degree.

I am working in FI module from 2016. I have developed and delivered  many SAP scripting code to automate our work.

So, I would like to learn more about SAP so that I can be developed more automation. Further I want to change my career path from end user to SAP consultant.

The digital skills initiative will help me to certify in SAP module which will enhance my professional career and open up a lot more opportunities for me.

Thanks & Regards

Devender Kumar Yadav

RISE with SAP SAP SuccessFactors Platform 

#Digitalskillinitiative

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: Mechanisms for putting production order on ho...
entry.content: Trying to get away from this approach could this be done with tools as materials when floor stock is used?
